description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a predominantly matte black finish and metallic accents. The barrel is thick and appears to have venting holes along the top, with a cylindrical metallic section near the receiver. A prominent optical sight is mounted on the top rail, and the body includes a number of mechanical details such as screws, rails, and a visible trigger assembly. The grip is ergonomic and angled, resembling a pistol grip, and the overall build suggests a modern, urban combat application. The trigger guard is rounded and substantial, providing ample space for finger placement. The shotgun's construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a solid and durable appearance.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with a matte black finish, metallic accents, and an optical sight mounted on top. It features a pistol grip, vented barrel, and robust mechanical details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, vented barrel, and optical sight aligned above the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length of the barrel, optical sight, metallic receiver, and ergonomic pistol grip.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the optical sight, the top rail, and the grip's alignment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the shotgun's mechanical details, grip, and the side profile of the optical sight.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with venting holes along the top and a thick, short profile
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
